title: LlmSummarizationSettings
description: Configuration for automatic context overflow summarization in the LLM gateway plugin. When the plugin returns a context_overflow error, Chat Engine summarizes older messages and retries with a compact context.

recent_messages_to_keep.description: Number of most recent messages to keep unsummarized when context overflow occurs. The remaining older messages are sent to the plugin for summarization via on_session_summary.
